plugins.name: call-notes-plugin
plugins.description: Turn a call or meeting transcript into a structured Word briefing in the August Group house template.

plugins.name: daily-summary-plugin
plugins.description: End-of-day debrief pulling Teams, Outlook calendar, and email

plugins.name: weekly-summary-plugin
plugins.description: Weekly recap of activities grouped by topic with open loops

plugins.name: check-in-plugin
plugins.description: Mid-task gut check on whether the current path is the right one, with independent critic subagents and clearly laid-out alternatives

plugins.name: say-back-plugin
plugins.description: Makes the agent state its plan before acting — the user confirms before any action is taken.

plugins.name: cfu-skill-plugin
plugins.description: Generate an August Group CFU (Client-Facing Update / quarterly Company & Fund Update) DOCX that matches the historica...

plugins.name: marketplace-publisher-plugin
plugins.description: Publish skills from your Cowork workspace to the August Group marketplace

plugins.name: investment-summary-plugin
plugins.description: Generate an August Group Investment Summary (.docx) for a single operating company, matching the house deck style (Ad...

plugins.name: council-plugin
plugins.description: Three agents argue different sides of a decision, then a chairman picks the best-argued answer. For genuine forks: build vs buy, two architectures, invest vs pass.

plugins.name: devils-advocate-plugin
plugins.description: Argues the strongest honest case against the position you just took — steelman first, then the counter-case — and hands the decision back. One turn.

plugins.name: find-unknowns-plugin
plugins.description: Surfaces what you don't know you don't know before you build — a quick interview, mock options, or a blindspot sweep, whichever fits the gap.

plugins.name: grill-plugin
plugins.description: Interviews you one question at a time before a build, until the spec is out of your head — then hands back a tight brief to build against.

plugins.name: premortem-plugin
plugins.description: Assume the plan already failed, then work backward: what killed it, the earliest warning signs, and the cheapest tests to run today.

plugins.name: august-hub-plugin
plugins.description: Search the skill library, see what's new, and file workshop ideas straight from chat — no site visit needed. Requires a Hub API token from Cal.

plugins.name: boc-fx-plugin
plugins.description: Retrieve official Bank of Canada USD-to-CAD daily average exchange rates and apply them to USD amounts.
